reviews.comment:
Malísimo, estuve como una hora esperando mí pedido (2 hamburguesas dobles y tres empanadas) y cada que iba a preguntar nos metían la excusa de que las empanadas tardaban 3 EMPANADAS ERAN. Cuando fui a pedir que solo me dieran las hamburguesas no me las daban! Osea que tampoco estaban listas las hamburguesas.
Al final solo pedimos las dos hamburguesas y la plata de las empanadas pero ni siquiera nos pudieron dar la plata porque supuestamente el ticket que nos dieron ellos mismo no funcionaba y ellos jamás nos dieron otro ticket, así que nos dieron una hamburguesa de más pero ni siquiera como las habíamos pedido.
NUNCA MAS

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. I waited about an hour for my order (two double hamburgers and three empanadas), and every time I asked, they gave me the excuse that the empanadas were taking longer. It was three empanadas! When I asked if I could just have the hamburgers, they wouldn't give them to me! So the hamburgers weren't ready either.
In the end, we only ordered the two hamburgers and got a refund for the empanadas, but they couldn't even give us the money back because supposedly the receipt they gave us didn't work, and they never gave us another one. So they gave us an extra hamburger, but it wasn't even the way we ordered it. NEVER AGAIN.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURadlpxUzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No le pongo menos estrellas poque no hay, las burger de campo las peores, ni siquiera te cocinan en el momento las tienen listas quedan horrible! Y ni buen dia el que atiende...

(Translated by Google)
I'm not giving it fewer stars because there aren't any. The country burgers are the worst. They don't even cook them right away; they're ready to go, they're horrible! And the waiter doesn't even have a good day...

reviews.comment:
Tardaron medio año para atenderme, no me dieron bien el cambio, me robaron 50 pesos y el lugar es re chico, en vez de poner para comer afuera hubieran hecho el lugar más grande. Un señor había pedido para llevar y se lo dieron para consumir en el lugar, lo único bueno es la comida y que los que atienden son buena onda.
SE TARDARON MÁS DE 30 MINUTOS EN DAR UN CAFÉ CON LECHE

(Translated by Google)
It took them half a year to serve me. They didn't give me the correct change, stole 50 pesos, and the place is really small. Instead of offering outside dining, they should have made it bigger. A man had ordered takeout, and they let him eat in. The only good thing about it is the food and the friendly staff.
IT TOOK MORE THAN 30 MINUTES TO GET A COFFEE WITH WHITE
